mnemonics: Green IT: G.R.E.E.N. - Generate Renewable Energy, Efficiently use resources, Neutralize e-waste.
Energy Consumption: Remember E.C.O. - Energy Conservation is Optimal. Use semiconductors with lower power requirements.
Physical Properties: Think P.H.Y.S.I.C.A.L. - Properties Help Your System In Conserving All Levels of energy.
keyPoints: Green IT focuses on reducing environmental impact through energy-efficient technologies.
Energy consumption can be reduced by optimizing hardware and software.
Semiconductors play a key role in energy efficiency due to their physical properties.
commonMistakes: Overlooking the lifecycle environmental impact of IT equipment.
Focusing only on energy consumption without considering other sustainability factors.
